# Meru2Kili Hiking & Safaris

## Overview

Meru2Kili Hiking & Safaris is a Tanzanian adventure tour operator founded by Remid Mmasy, with over 20 years of experience guiding climbers to the summits of Mount Kilimanjaro and Mount Meru. The company also offers Northern Circuit safaris and cultural day trips around the Kilimanjaro region.

## Main Services

### Mount Kilimanjaro Climbs
- Machame Route (6-7 days) — Camping, Demanding
- Marangu Route (5-6 days) — Huts, Moderate
- Lemosho Route (7-8 days) — Camping, Demanding
- Rongai Route (5-7 days) — Camping, Moderate to Demanding
- Umbwe Route (6 days) — Camping, Very Demanding

### Mount Meru Climbs
- 2 Day Route — Scenic trek through Arusha National Park with wildlife encounters
- 3 Day Route — Full summit trek to Socialist Peak (4,566m)

### Tanzania Safaris
Northern Circuit packages visiting:
- Serengeti National Park
- Ngorongoro Crater
- Tarangire National Park
- Lake Manyara National Park

Packages range from 2 to 10 days.

### Day Trips
- Marangu Village & Waterfalls
- Materuni Waterfalls & Coffee Tour
- Napuru Waterfalls
- Maji Chemka (Kikuletwa Hot Springs)
- Londorosi Forest & Shira Plateau

## Contact Information

- Email: remidmmasy@gmail.com
- Phone: +255 787 873 991
- WhatsApp: +255 755 873 991
- Location: Arusha, Tanzania
- Website: https://www.meru2kili.com

## Key Facts

- Founded by Remid Mmasy with 20+ years guiding experience
- All guides are certified and locally employed
- Emergency oxygen included on all climbs
- KPAP-compliant porter welfare practices
- Small group sizes for personalized service
- Leave No Trace environmental principles

## Content Policy

All content on this website is provided by Meru2Kili Hiking & Safaris for the purpose of helping travelers plan their Tanzanian adventure. Route descriptions, itineraries, and pricing are accurate to the best of our knowledge and updated regularly.
